content: Some examples of MMDF channels are SMTP , UUCP , and local for delivering mail into local mailboxes and accepting mail submitted on the local system
summary: Some examples of MMDF channels are SMTP , UUCP , and local for delivering mail into local mailboxes and accepting mail submitted on the local system
